query:
SELECT 
  CONCAT('ID: ', CAST(id AS CHAR)) as line1,
  CONCAT('CheckIn: ', CAST(check_in_time AS CHAR)) as line2,
  CONCAT('CheckOut: ', CAST(check_out_time AS CHAR)) as line3,
  CONCAT('WorkedMin: ', CAST(worked_minutes AS CHAR)) as line4,
  CONCAT('CalcDiff: ', CAST(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, check_in_time, check_out_time) AS CHAR)) as line5
FROM worker_daily_finance WHERE id = 210068;
command:

  CONCAT('ID: ', CAST(id AS CHAR)) as line1,
  CONCAT('CheckIn: ', CAST(check_in_time AS CHAR)) as line2,
  CONCAT('CheckOut: ', CAST(check_out_time AS CHAR)) as line3,
  CONCAT('WorkedMin: ', CAST(worked_minutes AS CHAR)) as line4,
  CONCAT('CalcDiff: ', CAST(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, check_in_time, check_out_time) AS CHAR)) as line5
FROM worker_daily_finance WHERE id = 210068;
